title: pelargonium hispidum
intro: Pelargonium hispidum, also known as the hairy-leaved rose geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium hispidum include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
